---
title: "Contact"
description: "How to reach me"
toc: false
---

## Email

- **Institutional:** [gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es](mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es)
- **Personal:** [gllamosasg@gmail.com](mailto:gllamosasg@gmail.com)

## Office

Department of Public Finance · Faculty of Economics and Business · University of Málaga · Calle El Ejido s/n · 29071 Málaga · Spain.

Office hours by appointment via Campus Virtual or email.

## Online

- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/gonzalo-llamosas-garcia/){target="_blank"}
- [X (Twitter)](https://x.com/gonzalollamosas){target="_blank"}
- [GitHub](https://github.com/lgg18106){target="_blank"}
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=O8gTD4AAAAAJ&hl=en){target="_blank"}
- [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-4407-2845){target="_blank"}
- [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Gonzalo-Llamosas-Garcia-2){target="_blank"}
- [UMA research portal](https://portaldelainvestigacion.uma.es/investigadores/2208701/detalle){target="_blank"}

## Media and policy enquiries

For media enquiries on fiscal policy, public debt sustainability, behavioural economics applied to public policy, or AI and the tax base, please write to [gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es](mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es) with a brief description of the request and the deadline.

## Speaking and consultancy

I am open to speaking engagements, teaching collaborations and policy consultancies that are compatible with my position at the University of Málaga (Spanish Law 53/1984 on incompatibilities). For consultancy enquiries please describe the scope and indicative timeline; I will reply with availability.

## En español

> *Para consultas en español sobre política fiscal, sostenibilidad de la deuda pública, economía conductual aplicada a la política pública, o el impacto de la IA sobre la base imponible, escribe a [gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es](mailto:gonzalo.llamosas@uma.es) con una descripción breve y el plazo. Acepto invitaciones a conferencias, docencia externa y consultoría compatible con mi puesto en la UMA.*
